selectDocType.title: Select Document Type
selectDocType.subtitle: Choose the document you'd like to verify with

capture.frontInstruction: Position the FRONT of your document
capture.backInstruction: Position the BACK of your document

review.title: Review Photo
review.hint: Make sure text is clear and all edges are visible

face.title: Take a Selfie
face.instruction: Position your face in the circle
face.helper: Hold steady and look straight ahead

processing.title: Verifying your identity
processing.subtitle: This usually takes a few seconds

pending.title: Verification In Progress
pending.description: We're reviewing your documents. This usually takes a few minutes.
pending.note: We'll notify you when verification is complete

approved.title: Identity Verified
approved.description: Your identity has been verified. You can now use all features.

rejected.title: Verification Failed
rejected.description: We couldn't verify your identity. Please review the issues below and resubmit.

expired.title: Verification Expired
expired.description: Your verification has expired. Please submit updated documents to continue.

resubmit.title: Resubmit Documents
resubmit.subtitle: Only re-capture the items marked below

expiredModal.title: Documents Expired
expiredModal.description: Your identity documents have expired. To continue using transfers and deposits, please update your documents.
expiredModal.consequences: Without updating, you won't be able to:

cancelDialog.title: Cancel verification?
cancelDialog.description: Your progress will be saved. You can resume verification later.

errors.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to capture your document. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
errors.captureFailed: Could not capture photo. Please try again or choose from gallery.
errors.uploadTooLarge: Image is too large. Please try again with a smaller photo.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Image format not supported. Please use JPG or PNG.
errors.verificationFailed: Verification could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Connection lost. Your photos are saved. Please try again when connected.
